allow: Bash(curl -s -N http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","id":1}')

Bash(curl -s --noproxy * -D - http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -H 'Mcp-Session-Id: ef094999effc40099e7444d731b06c91' -X POST -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","id":2}')
